    B

    Bat - Class in cz.cvut.fel.pjv.weapons.weaponInstances
    Bat represents a specific melee weapon type, inheriting common behavior from the Weapon class.
    Bat() - Constructor for class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.weapons.weaponInstances.Bat

    BlackBrick - Class in cz.cvut.fel.pjv.blocks
    The BlackBrick class represents a block with a black brick texture.

    Block - Class in cz.cvut.fel.pjv.blocks
    The Block class serves as a base for various block types in the game.

    BlockDrawer - Class in cz.cvut.fel.pjv
    BlockDrawer extends the Drawer class to handle graphical representations of blocks.
    BlockDrawer(double, double, String, int, int) - Constructor for class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.BlockDrawer
    Constructs a new BlockDrawer with specified screen positions, texture, and level grid coordinates.
    blockImage - Variable in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.Drawer
     
    blockImageView - Variable in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.Drawer
     
    blockManager - Static variable in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.Game
     
    BlockManager - Class in cz.cvut.fel.pjv.managers
    BlockManager is responsible for discovering, registering, and providing instances of Block classes.
    BlockManager() - Constructor for class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.managers.BlockManager
    Constructs a new BlockManager and initializes the block registry.
    blocksList - Static variable in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.Game
     
    blockTexture - Variable in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.Drawer
     
    blur - Variable in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.Game
     
    Brick - Class in cz.cvut.fel.pjv.blocks
    The Brick class is an implementation of the Block class that represents a standard brick.
    Brick() - Constructor for class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.blocks.Brick
     
    Bullet - Class in cz.cvut.fel.pjv.weapons
    The Bullet class represents a projectile in the game, extending the base Projectile class.
    Bullet(double, double, double, double, double, BulletType, double, double, String, Team) - Constructor for class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.weapons.Bullet
    Constructs a new Bullet with the specified parameters.

    bulletSpeed - Variable in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.weapons.Weapon
     
    bulletType - Variable in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.weapons.Weapon
     
    BulletType - Enum Class in cz.cvut.fel.pjv.weapons
    BulletType enumerates the various types of ammunition available in the game.
    BURST - Enum constant in enum class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.weapons.FireMode
